title: Specklinia sonderiana
taxonomy: Specklinia sonderiana is a species of orchid in the genus Specklinia, which belongs to the family Orchidaceae. It is a member of the tribe Maxillarieae. The species is further classified into the subtribe Maxillariinae. The classification of Specklinia sonderiana reflects its evolutionary relationships within the orchid family. This classification provides valuable information for understanding the plant's behavior, growth, and habitat requirements.
